name: @mdigital/modules
description: Production-ready feature modules — complete business logic domains with API clients, hooks, types, and orchestration components. Each module combines with widgets/pages/layouts from the mdigital ecosystem.

items.name: auth
items.description: Complete auth system — API client, session management, protected routes, auth guard, token refresh. Wire to your backend.

items.name: dashboard
items.description: Dashboard data layer — KPI hooks, chart data management, date range filters, activity timeline API.

items.name: ecommerce
items.description: Ecommerce logic — cart management, checkout flow, order tracking, product queries, invoice handling.

items.name: crm
items.description: CRM logic — contacts, deals, pipeline stages, activity timeline, lead scoring, filters.

items.name: file-management
items.description: File management — upload with XHR progress, file browser, selection, filtering, folder navigation.

items.name: messaging
items.description: Messaging system — conversations, messages, typing indicators, presence, real-time hooks, pagination.

items.name: settings
items.description: Settings system — profile, notifications, appearance, security, billing, team. Section nav with dirty tracking.

items.name: hrm
items.description: HR management — employee directory, attendance clock-in/out, leave management, goal tracking, skills matrix.
